# Acuity Health

> AI receptionist for ophthalmology practices

## Quick Overview
Acuity Health builds an AI receptionist for ophthalmology and optometry practices. The system answers inbound patient calls, handles routine front-desk requests, books appointments directly into the EMR, captures after-hours demand, and escalates calls to staff when human help is needed.

## Product
- AI receptionist for ophthalmology
- Direct EMR appointment booking
- After-hours and weekend call capture
- Multilingual call handling, including Spanish
- Medical vs. vision insurance routing
- Pediatric and urgent-visit workflow support
- Front-desk analytics across locations
- Two-way SMS, confirmations, and reminders

## Integrations
- AdvancedMD integration available today
- Athena and Compulink integrations in progress
- Additional EMRs prioritized by practice demand

## Team
- Kyle Shechtman, Co-founder and CEO
- Chase Fagen, Co-founder and Head of Engineering
- Dr. Michael Venincasa, Chief Medical Officer

## Best-Fit Customers
- Ophthalmology and optometry practices
- Multi-location eye care groups
- Practices losing calls to voicemail, hold times, or after-hours leakage
- Practices that need appointment booking written directly into the EMR
- Front desks overloaded by repetitive scheduling and routing calls
